title: 居酒屋 天狗
setting: An izakaya (Japanese pub) in Shinjuku, Tokyo. 19:30. You go out drinking with new colleagues.

npc.name: 山田さん
npc.personality: cheerful colleague, uses friendly casual Japanese. A bit tipsy and very talkative.
npc.initialLine: お疲れ様です！何を飲みますか？
npc.initialTranslation: Thanks for your hard work! What will you drink?

debriefRu: あなたは同僚と新宿の居酒屋に来ています。料理を注文して、会話を楽しんでください。
debriefEn: You're at an izakaya in Shinjuku with colleagues. Order food and enjoy the conversation.

turns.instruction: Raise your glass and say cheers! Ask what food they recommend.

prompt.ru: Kanpai! O-susume no tabemono o oshiete kudasai.
prompt.phonetic: Kan-pie! Oh-soo-soo-meh no tah-beh-moh-noh oh oh-shee-eh-teh koo-dah-sai.
prompt.en: Cheers! Please tell me what food you recommend.
prompt.native_script: 乾杯！おすすめの食べ物を教えてください。
枝豆とビールをください。

turns.instruction: Ask about the grilled fish — is it fresh today?

prompt.ru: Kono yakizakana wa kyō no shinsen desu ka?
prompt.phonetic: Koh-noh yah-kee-zah-kah-nah wah kyoh noh shin-sen des-kah?
prompt.en: Is this grilled fish fresh today?
prompt.native_script: この焼き魚は今日の新鮮ですか？

turns.instruction: Compliment the food — say it's really delicious.

prompt.ru: Kono ryōri wa hontō ni oishii desu ne!
prompt.phonetic: Koh-noh ryoh-ree wah hon-toh nee oy-shee-ee des-neh!
prompt.native_script: この料理は本当に美味しいですね！

turns.instruction: Say you should do this again sometime.

prompt.native_script: また今度一緒に飲みましょう！
